description: Action enum — add SourceFileRemoved and SourceDirRemoved variants
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs and locate the Action enum (line ~115)
Add SourceFileRemoved { path: PathBuf } variant with doc comment: 'A migrated source file was removed'
Add SourceDirRemoved { path: PathBuf } variant with doc comment: 'An empty source directory was removed after file cleanup'
Ensure both variants derive Debug and Clone (already on the enum)
Run cargo build --workspace to verify no compilation errors
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings to verify no lint violations

description: Outcome helper methods — has_migrated_artifacts() and migrated_source_paths()
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs and locate the Outcome struct (line ~155)
Add impl block for Outcome with has_migrated_artifacts() returning bool — checks if any Action::PluginCreated exists
Add migrated_source_paths() returning Vec<&Path> — filters PluginCreated actions and extracts source field
Add unit test: has_migrated_artifacts returns false for empty actions vec
Add unit test: has_migrated_artifacts returns false for vec with only Skipped/Renamed actions
Add unit test: has_migrated_artifacts returns true when PluginCreated is present
Add unit test: migrated_source_paths returns correct paths from mixed action vec
Add unit test: migrated_source_paths returns empty vec when no PluginCreated actions
Run cargo test --workspace and verify all new tests pass
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Cleanup module — remove_migrated_sources() with skip list and directory pruning
steps: Create crates/libaipm/src/migrate/cleanup.rs
Add mod cleanup; to crates/libaipm/src/migrate/mod.rs
Implement SKIP_FILENAMES const array containing 'settings.json' and '.mcp.json'
Implement remove_migrated_sources(outcome: &Outcome, fs: &dyn Fs) -> Result<Vec<Action>, std::io::Error>
Filter migrated_source_paths() to exclude paths whose file_name() is in SKIP_FILENAMES
For each remaining path: if is_file, call fs.remove_file() and push SourceFileRemoved action
For each remaining path: if is_dir, call fs.remove_dir_all() and push SourceDirRemoved action
Collect parent directories into BTreeSet for empty-directory pruning
Sort parent dirs by component count descending (deepest first)
For each parent dir: if is_dir_empty (via fs.read_dir), call fs.remove_dir_all and push SourceDirRemoved
Implement is_dir_empty helper using fs.read_dir()
Add unit test: empty outcome produces no actions
Add unit test: skill directory source is removed via remove_dir_all
Add unit test: command file source is removed via remove_file
Add unit test: settings.json source path is skipped (not removed)
Add unit test: .mcp.json source path is skipped (not removed)
Add unit test: empty parent directory is pruned after child removal
Add unit test: non-empty parent directory is NOT pruned
Add unit test: remove_file error propagates and stops further cleanup
Add unit test: mixed artifact types (skill dir + command file + settings.json skip)
Run cargo test --workspace and verify all cleanup tests pass
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: CLI — add --destructive flag to Migrate subcommand and update cmd_migrate handler
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/main.rs and locate Commands::Migrate variant (line ~112)
Add destructive: bool field with #[arg(long)] and doc comment
Update the dispatch match arm in run() to destructure destructive and pass to cmd_migrate()
Update cmd_migrate() signature to accept destructive: bool parameter
Add post-migration cleanup phase after existing action printing loop
Guard cleanup: skip if dry_run is true or result.has_migrated_artifacts() is false
If destructive is true: set should_clean = true (skip wizard)
If destructive is false: check std::io::stdin().is_terminal() for interactivity
If interactive: call wizard_tty::resolve_migrate_cleanup(interactive, &result)
If non-interactive (non-TTY): set should_clean = false (silently skip)
If should_clean: call libaipm::migrate::cleanup::remove_migrated_sources() and print actions
Add match arms for SourceFileRemoved and SourceDirRemoved in the cleanup action printer
Run cargo build --workspace to verify compilation
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Wizard — migrate cleanup prompt step in wizard.rs (pure logic layer)
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/wizard.rs
Add pub fn migrate_cleanup_prompt_steps(migrated_count: usize) -> Vec<PromptStep>
Return empty vec if migrated_count == 0
Otherwise return vec with one PromptStep: label='Remove original source files that were migrated?', kind=Confirm{default:false}, help text mentioning --destructive
Add pub fn resolve_migrate_cleanup_answer(answers: &[PromptAnswer]) -> bool
Return true only if first answer is PromptAnswer::Bool(true)
Add insta snapshot test: migrate_cleanup_prompt_zero_migrated returns empty steps
Add insta snapshot test: migrate_cleanup_prompt_with_migrated returns one Confirm step
Add unit test: resolve_migrate_cleanup_answer returns true for Bool(true)
Add unit test: resolve_migrate_cleanup_answer returns false for Bool(false)
Add unit test: resolve_migrate_cleanup_answer returns false for empty slice
Run cargo test --workspace and verify all wizard tests pass
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: Wizard TTY — resolve_migrate_cleanup() bridge function in wizard_tty.rs
steps: Open crates/aipm/src/wizard_tty.rs
Add pub fn resolve_migrate_cleanup(interactive: bool, outcome: &libaipm::migrate::Outcome) -> Result<bool, Box<dyn std::error::Error>>
If not interactive: return Ok(false)
Compute migrated_count from outcome.migrated_source_paths().len()
Call wizard::migrate_cleanup_prompt_steps(migrated_count) to get steps
If steps is empty: return Ok(false)
Set inquire global render config via wizard::styled_render_config()
Call execute_prompts(&steps) to run the prompt
Return wizard::resolve_migrate_cleanup_answer(&answers)
Run cargo build --workspace to verify compilation

description: Dry-run report — add cleanup plan section for --dry-run --destructive
steps: Open crates/libaipm/src/migrate/dry_run.rs
Update generate_report() signature to accept destructive: bool parameter
Update generate_recursive_report() signature to accept destructive: bool parameter
When destructive is true, append a '## Cleanup Plan (--destructive)' section to the report
List each artifact source path that would be deleted (file or directory with type label)
Add a 'Skipped (shared config)' subsection listing settings.json and .mcp.json if present
Update callers in mod.rs (migrate_single_source and migrate_recursive) to pass dry_run and destructive
Since Options struct does not have destructive, pass it separately or via a new DryRunContext
Update cmd_migrate() to pass destructive to the Options or dry-run path
Add unit test: report without destructive flag has no cleanup section
Add unit test: report with destructive flag includes cleanup plan with artifact paths
Add unit test: report with destructive flag lists skipped shared config files
Run cargo test --workspace and verify all dry-run tests pass
Run cargo clippy --workspace -- -D warnings

description: BDD scenarios — add migrate --destructive acceptance tests to migrate.feature
steps: Open tests/features/manifest/migrate.feature
Add new Rule: 'Source files can be removed after migration'
Add Scenario: --destructive removes migrated skill source files (verify .claude/skills/deploy/ is gone)
Add Scenario: --destructive preserves settings.json (hooks migrated but settings.json remains)
Add Scenario: Without --destructive, source files are preserved in non-TTY mode
Add Scenario: --destructive with --dry-run shows cleanup plan in report
Add Scenario: --destructive in recursive mode cleans all discovered .claude/ sources
Add Scenario: Empty .claude/ subdirectories are pruned after cleanup
Implement any new step definitions needed (e.g., 'there is no directory X in Y', 'hooks exist in Y settings.json')
Run cargo test --workspace to verify BDD scenarios pass

description: E2E tests — add --destructive integration tests to migrate_e2e.rs
steps: Open crates/aipm/tests/migrate_e2e.rs
Add test: destructive_flag_removes_skill_source — init project, create skill, run migrate --destructive, assert source files gone and plugin exists
Add test: destructive_flag_preserves_settings_json — init project, create hooks in settings.json, run migrate --destructive, assert settings.json still exists
Add test: without_destructive_preserves_sources — init project, create skill, run migrate (non-TTY via assert_cmd), assert source files still exist
Add test: destructive_with_dry_run_shows_plan — run migrate --dry-run --destructive, assert report contains 'Cleanup Plan', assert source files still exist
Add test: destructive_recursive_cleans_all — create skills in root and sub-package, run migrate --destructive, assert all sources cleaned
Add test: destructive_prunes_empty_directories — create single skill, run migrate --destructive, assert .claude/skills/ directory is removed
Add test: destructive_skips_mcp_json — create .mcp.json, run migrate --destructive, assert .mcp.json still exists
Run cargo test --workspace and verify all E2E tests pass

description: Coverage gate — verify 89% branch coverage for all new code
steps: Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov clean --workspace
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --workspace --branch
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov --no-report --doc
Run cargo +nightly llvm-cov report --doctests --branch --ignore-filename-regex '(tests/|research/|specs/|wizard_tty\.rs)'
Verify TOTAL branch coverage is >= 89%
If below threshold: identify uncovered branches in cleanup.rs, wizard.rs, mod.rs
Add additional tests to cover missing branches
Re-run coverage until threshold is met
Run cargo fmt --check to verify formatting
